attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ACCOUNTED_CR,
 MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ACCOUNTED_DR,
  MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ACCOUNTED_NR_TAX,
   MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ACCOUNTED_REC_TAX, 
   MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ACCOUNTING_DATE, 
   MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ACCRUAL_METHOD_FLAG,
    MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ACTUAL_FLAG,
     MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE1,
      MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE10, 
      MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE11, 
      MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE12,
       MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE13,
        MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE14,
         MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE15,
          MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE2,
           MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE3,
            MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE4, 
            MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE5,
             MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE6,
              MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE7,
               MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE8,
                MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE9,
                 MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
                  MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.BUDGET_VERSION_ID, 
                  MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
                   MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
                    MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.CREATED_BY, 
                    MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.CREATION_DATE, 
                    MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.CURRENCY_CODE, 
                    MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE,
                     MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,
                      MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.DATE_CREATED_IN_GL,
                       MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID,
                        MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ENTERED_CR,
                         MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ENTERED_DR, 
                         MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ENTERED_NR_TAX, 
                         MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ENTERED_REC_TAX,
                          MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
                           MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.GES_PK_ID, 
                           MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
                           MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.GLOBAL_NAME,
                            MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.GL_SL_LINK_ID,
                             Replace(
Replace(
Replace(
Replace(MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.JE_BATCH_DESCRIPTION,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e'),chr(9),' ')  JE_BATCH_DESCRIPTION, 
                               Replace(
Replace(
Replace(
Replace(MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.JE_BATCH_NAME,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e'),chr(9),' ')  JE_BATCH_NAME, 
                               Replace(
Replace(
Replace(
Replace(MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.JE_CATEGORY_NAME,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e'),chr(9),' ') JE_CATEGORY_NAME, 
                               Replace(
Replace(
Replace(
Replace(MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.JE_HEADER_NAME,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e'),chr(9),' ') JE_HEADER_NAME, 
                               Replace(
Replace(
Replace(
Replace(MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.JE_LINE_DESCRIPTION,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e'),chr(9),' ') JE_LINE_DESCRIPTION,
                               Replace(
Replace(
Replace(
Replace(MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.JE_SOURCE_NAME,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e'),chr(9),' ')  JE_SOURCE_NAME, 
                              MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
                               MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
                                MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
                                 MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.PERIOD_NAME, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.PROGRAM_ID, 
                                 MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REFERENCE1, 
                                 MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REFERENCE10, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REFERENCE2, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REFERENCE3, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REFERENCE4,
                                  MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REFERENCE5, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REFERENCE6, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REFERENCE7, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REFERENCE8,
                                   MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REFERENCE9, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REQUEST_ID, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REVERSAL_PERIOD_NAME,
                                    MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.REVERSE_JOURNAL_FLAG, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY,
                                     MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.SUBLEDGER_DOC_SEQUENCE_ID, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.SUBLEDGER_DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.
                                     TRANSACTION_DATE, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.USER_CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
                                      MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.PA_ADDITION_FLAG, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.RCV_SUB_LEDGER_ID, MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE, 
                                      MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.ACCOUNTING_EVENT_ID 
FROM
 MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER
WHERE  MF_RCV_RECV_SUB_LEDGER.GES_UPDATE_DATE>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate',
'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
